text: I always loved animals. I didn't care for humans. I loved dogs, squirrels, birds, fish...anything that lived outside. I became friends with a cat named Felix. Felix could be wild at times but was gentle and very loyal. Once, I heard a beautiful singing bird outside. Every morning it sang a different song, drawing me outdoors. Every morning it drew me out of my shell. One day the bird sang a special song that brought tears to my eyes. The cat joined me, lying beside me and purring softly. That day, I decided I didn't want to go back inside. I stayed, watching the world with Felix by my side. The sun setting behind the trees painted them all in hues of orange and gold. We didn't say much to each other, but Felix knew everything was better with someone who listened. Eventually, one of my kind-hearted neighbors must have found us, because I saw them scoop the cat into their coat pocket as they wheeled
